members.name: Todd Vasos
members.title: CEO
members.bio: Leading Dollar General's expansion strategy focused on store growth and cost management.

members.name: Michael Calbert
members.title: Chairman
members.bio: Former KKR partner. Background in private equity and retail investment.

members.name: Sandra MacQuillan
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former supply chain executive at Mondelez. Background in consumer packaged goods logistics.

members.name: William Rhodes III
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former CEO of AutoZone. Retail auto parts operations experience.

members.name: Ralph Alvarez
members.title: Director
members.bio: Former COO of McDonald's. Experience in restaurant operations and franchising.

strategy_text: Dollar General is focused on expanding store count and serving rural communities with affordable products. Our strategy emphasizes operational simplicity, cost management, and store-level execution.
